command: python -m pip install -r requirements-colab.txt && python -m scripts.deadline_vs_small_model --output results/deadline_vs_small_model_001_summary.json --small-models resnet20 resnet32 resnet44 --batch-size 256 --threshold-val-size 5000 --require-cuda
note: Decision experiment for whether the deadline route is worth keeping: compare BranchyNet deadline exits against same-deadline standalone small CIFAR-10 models with the same confidence-reject evaluation.
